steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes in a very hot climate risk excessive solar exposure, sunburn, and rapid loss of acidity.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Retaining sufficient canopy provides shade and lowers the temperature of exposed bunches during the hottest part of the day.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The fruit is better protected from heat damage and can retain more freshness, although excessive shade would hinder ripening.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The fruit is better protected from heat damage and can retain more freshness, although excessive shade would hinder ripening.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
